summary: Translation testing for CryptoNai - Fixed critical 't is not defined' error in /pro/index.tsx (Mentor List page). All tested pages now load without Server Errors. French translations verified on homepage, login, VIP Hub, Pro, Admin, and Profile pages.
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: /app/frontend/app/pro/index.tsx was missing 'import { useTranslation } from '../../store/languageStore'' and 'const { t } = useTranslation()' call inside the component
The t() function was used at lines 174, 204, 221, 247, 274, 320, 351 but was never imported or initialized
Added import statement at top of file and initialized t inside ProsListScreen component
All translation keys (mentorIndex.startingAt, mentorIndex.searchPlaceholder, mentorIndex.expertiseFilter, etc.) exist in translations.ts for FR/EN/ES

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All pages load without 't is not defined' error

context_for_next_testing_agent: Fixed critical 't is not defined' error in /pro/index.tsx. All main pages tested: Homepage, Login, Pro/Mentor List, VIP Hub, Admin, Profile - all load without errors. French translations confirmed working. Language selector on homepage not visible in initial view (may require scroll or login). Testing was done with Expo tunnel URL https://academy-preview-11.preview.emergentagent.com

pages_tested.homepage: PASS - No errors, French translations visible
pages_tested.login: PASS - No errors, French translations visible
pages_tested.pro_index: PASS - Fixed t() error, now loads correctly
pages_tested.vip_hub: PASS - No errors, French translations visible
